name: Shadowrend
location: Shadowrend in The Banished Cells I, Maj al-Ragath

bonuses.stat:
When you take damage, you summon a shadowy Clannfear for 15 seconds. The Clannfear's attacks deal 615 Magic damage and apply Minor Maim, reducing the target's damage done by 5% for 2 seconds. 

The Clannfear can be summoned once every 15 seconds and its damage scales off your Max Health.
